/usr/bin/g++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test11.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test11.dir/test11_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test11.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test11.dir/mainwindow/mainwindow.cpp.o -o test11  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.0
